## Description

A brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Test update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Code is formatted (PEP 8)
- [ ] New commands have docstrings
- [ ] Breaking changes noted in description

## Related Issues

Link any related issues: `Fixes #123` / `Closes #456`

## Additional Notes

Anything else the maintainer should know.
